CREATE TABLE test_blaek3 (input_string String, hashed_value FixedString(32));
INSERT INTO test_blaek3 VALUES ('test1', BLAKE3('test1'));
INSERT INTO test_blaek3 VALUES ('test2', BLAKE3('test2'));
INSERT INTO test_blaek3 VALUES ('boundary-case', BLAKE3('boundary-case'));
INSERT INTO test_blaek3 VALUES ('', BLAKE3(''));
INSERT INTO test_blaek3 VALUES ('a', BLAKE3('a'));

INSERT INTO test_blaek3 VALUES ('very-long-input-string-which-is-expected-to-test-the-boundaries-of-the-blaek3-function', BLAKE3('very-long-input-string-which-is-expected-to-test-the-boundaries-of-the-blaek3-function'));
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(input_string)) AS hashed_output FROM test_blaek3;
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(input_string)) AS hashed_output FROM test_blaek3 WHERE input_string LIKE 'test%';
WITH (SELECT input_string FROM test_blaek3 WHERE LENGTH(input_string) < 100) AS temp_input SELECT hex(BLAKE3(temp_input)) FROM temp_input;
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(t1.input_string)) AS hash_value FROM test_blaek3 AS t1 JOIN test_blaek3 AS t2 ON t1.input_string = t2.input_string;
SELECT COUNT(*), hex(BLAKE3(input_string)) AS hashed_output FROM test_blaek3 GROUP BY hashed_output;
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(CONCAT(t1.input_string, ' ', t2.input_string))) FROM test_blaek3 AS t1 INNER JOIN test_blaek3 AS t2 ON t1.input_string != t2.input_string;
SELECT input_string, hex(BLAKE3(input_string)) AS hashed_output FROM test_blaek3 WHERE hashed_value = BLAKE3('test1');
SELECT hex(BLAKE3('complex input ' || input_string)) AS complex_hash FROM test_blaek3;
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(input_string)) FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_blaek3 WHERE input_string NOT LIKE 'test%') AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table (input String);
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES ('some-input'), ('another-input');
SELECT a.input, hex(BLAKE3(a.input)) AS hashed_output FROM another_table AS a JOIN test_blaek3 AS b ON a.input = b.input_string;
SELECT hex(BLAKE3(CONCAT(a.input, b.input))) AS combined_hash FROM another_table AS a CROSS JOIN test_blaek3 AS b;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_blaek3) AS total_records SELECT hex(BLAKE3(CAST(total_records AS String))) AS hashed_total;
